name: eCommerce Full Implementation
description: Complete eCommerce implementation workflow: analyze product catalog, validate checkout flow, configure pricelists, payment, delivery, SEO, and review.

steps.name: Analyze Product Catalog
steps.description: Review product templates, public categories, variants, and SEO metadata

steps.name: Validate Checkout Flow
steps.description: Check cart creation, address capture, delivery carrier, and payment provider readiness

steps.name: Configure Pricelists
steps.description: Set up website pricelists and price rules for B2C and B2C pricing

steps.name: Setup Payment & Delivery
steps.description: Enable payment providers and delivery carriers, configure capture modes and shipping rules

steps.name: Optimize Product SEO
steps.description: Set SEO titles, descriptions, URL slugs, and verify sitemap inclusion

steps.name: Final Review
steps.description: Run catalog and checkout validation again to confirm implementation quality
